description_long: This is a lush, leafy potted plant with dense, green foliage that spills over the edges of a round, reddish-brown terracotta pot. The leaves are pointed and deeply lobed, resembling those of a Japanese maple or similar ornamental species, and they create a voluminous, bushy appearance. The plant's stems and leaves cascade naturally, with some trailing downwards, giving it a slightly wild and untamed look. The pot itself is simple and unadorned, with a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative elements. The overall impression is of a healthy, well-maintained plant suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments. No plant identification label or tag is visible on the pot or among the foliage.
description: A dense, bushy potted plant with pointed green leaves overflowing a plain terracotta pot. The foliage is lush and slightly trailing, creating a vibrant, natural look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the plant's dense foliage spilling over the pot, with several leaves and stems trailing downwards.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the plant's rounded, bushy shape and the way the leaves cover most of the pot, with a few trailing stems visible.
description_view_2: From above, the plant appears especially full and leafy, with the pot barely visible beneath the thick canopy of leaves.
description_view_3: Another angled view showing the cascading nature of the foliage and the unobstructed, plain surface of the terracotta pot.
attribute_plant_species: Japanese maple (Acer palmatum) or similar ornamental foliage plant
